ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "time_edt" TEXT /* Time of the observation in Eastern Daylight Time */,
  "temperature_f" REAL /* Temperature recorded in Fahrenheit */,
  "dew_point_f" REAL /* Dew point recorded in Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "sea_level_pressure_in" REAL /* Sea level pressure in inches */,
  "visibility_mph" REAL /* Visibility measured in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction description */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed measured in miles per hour */,
  "gust_speed_mph" REAL /* Gust speed measured in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation_in" REAL /* Precipitation recorded in inches */,
  "events" TEXT /* Significant weather events reported */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions describing the weather (e.g., clear, cloudy) */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation in UTC */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the observation location */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., automated sensor, manual observation) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather observation station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for maintenance */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event (e.g., hurricane, thunderstorm) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the event */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the event */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Alert level (e.g., watch, warning) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., Clear, Cloudy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality log entry */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the observation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* User who performed the quality check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "calibration_details" TEXT /* Details of the calibration process if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation type (e.g., temperature, wind speed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the observation measures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting methodology */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the forecasting model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., severe weather, flood) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date and time of the alert */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* User who issued the alert */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_issued_by FOREIGN KEY ("issued_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "temperature_f" REAL /* Recorded temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "precipitation_in" REAL /* Recorded precipitation in inches */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Recorded humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Recorded wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Recorded wind direction */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_alerts" (
  "station_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station-alert link */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_alerts_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
